entity.summary: United States crypto exchange entity associated with the Binance brand. HEI records Binance US as a separate entity from other Binance derivatives or CCXT market-specific rows.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0250, hei_unadded_0251, and hei_unadded_0253 as one Binance US entity. Other Binance derivatives rows are intentionally left for later careful grouping.

events.title: Binance US recorded as separate US exchange entity
events.description: Binance US is recorded as a separate US exchange entity, consolidating Binance US / Binance.US / binanceus source rows without merging other Binance derivatives rows.
events.notes: Upgrade with launch, regulatory, or operating-history events if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: Binance US official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify Binance US identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Binance US
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0251.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika / CCXT references for Binance US naming variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0250 and hei_unadded_0253 refer to Binance US naming variants.
